title: Kepler's Books: Eric Ries with Kim Scott
summary: Eric appears at Kepler's Books in Menlo Park, California — one of Silicon Valley's most beloved independent bookstores — in conversation with Kim Scott, bestselling author of Radical Candor. The pairing is fitting: Scott's endorsement of the book calls for 'incorruptible governance' as a prerequisite for companies that want to make the world better in a hundred years.
blockquote: Success itself becomes a form of financial gravity, bending companies away from their original purpose.
